name: Pingboard
description: Pingboard org chart and people directory platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Register an OAuth application in Pingboard → Settings → API Applications
2. Use your client_id and client_secret to obtain an access token via OAuth2 client credentials
3. Paste the access token below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an OAuth access token via Pingboard's API (client credentials flow)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Pingboard users to verify org directory is up to date
